subject: session date
fact: The session date is Memorable Moments.
source_quote: Date: Memorable Moments

subject: Defensible Cave
fact: The party stumbled upon a cave with a single entrance after their journey through the Underdark.
source_quote: stumbles upon a cave with a single entrance

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim suggests the party rests in a cave with a single entrance.
source_quote: Bramgrim suggests the party rests in a cave with a single entrance

subject: alarm trap setup
fact: The party set up an alarm trap with string and a metal item at the cave entrance.
source_quote: setting up an alarm trap with string and a metal item at the entrance

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur positioned his cannon near the entrance.
source_quote: Felkur positions his cannon near the entrance

subject: sleeping arrangement decision
fact: The party decided to remain together rather than split up to sleep.
source_quote: the party remains together

subject: long rest
fact: The party took a long rest without incident.
source_quote: The party takes a long rest without incident

subject: scream heard
fact: The party heard a ragged scream that was suddenly choked off from the tunnels to the northeast.
source_quote: hears a ragged scream, suddenly choked off, from the tunnels to the northeast

subject: Daein
fact: Daein cast Pass Without Trace.
source_quote: Daein casts Pass Without Trace

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan was found huddled and rocking with dried blood from his ears.
source_quote: a man, Drystan, huddled and rocking, with dried blood from his ears

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan was found trying to comfort Drystan.
source_quote: a woman, Teegan, trying to comfort him

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan stepped protectively in front of Drystan as the party approached.
source_quote: Teegan steps protectively in front of Drystan as the party approaches

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan accused the party of working with Maram il Vass.
source_quote: accusing them of working with Maram il Vass

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim offered to heal Drystan.
source_quote: Bramgrim offers to heal Drystan

subject: Barlgura demons
fact: Two Barlgura demons appeared from behind shouting about 'the pets'.
source_quote: two Barlgura demons appear from behind, shouting about 'the pets'

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan screamed in fright during the ambush.
source_quote: Teegan screams in fright

subject: Owlbear
fact: One Barlgura attacked the Owlbear, knocking it prone and dealing significant damage.
source_quote: One Barlgura attacks the Owlbear, knocking it prone and dealing significant damage

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear used its second wind to recover.
source_quote: The Owlbear uses its second wind to recover

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians at fourth level, damaging both demons with radiant energy.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians at fourth level, damaging both demons with radiant energy

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim's Spirit Guardians halved one demon's speed.
source_quote: halving one's speed

subject: Daein
fact: Daein attacked one demon, dealing damage.
source_quote: Daein attacks one demon, dealing damage

subject: Barlgura demon
fact: The second Barlgura cast Phantasmal Killer on Daein.
source_quote: The second Barlgura casts Phantasmal Killer on Daein

subject: Daein
fact: Phantasmal Killer caused psychic damage and imposed disadvantage on Daein's attack rolls.
source_quote: causing psychic damage and imposing disadvantage on his attack rolls

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas cast Hunter's Mark and used Favorite Foe.
source_quote: Akritas casts Hunter's Mark and uses Favorite Foe

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas quickly defeated the first demon with her bow.
source_quote: quickly defeating the first demon with her bow

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur attempted to attack with a cantrip, then used his pistol.
source_quote: Felkur attempts to attack with a cantrip, then uses his pistol

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear attacked the remaining demon with its claws.
source_quote: The Owlbear attacks the remaining demon with its claws

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast Toll the Dead, further damaging the demon.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Toll the Dead, further damaging the demon

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used a luck point to overcome disadvantage.
source_quote: Daein uses a luck point to overcome disadvantage

subject: Daein
fact: Daein defeated the second demon with his attacks.
source_quote: defeats the second demon with his attacks

subject: demon death
fact: The second demon turned into dust and ochre upon defeat.
source_quote: which turns into dust and ochre

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan revealed that she and Drystan were enslaved by Maram il Vass in the 'Den of the Whispered Word'.
source_quote: reveals that she and Drystan were enslaved by Maram il Vass in the 'Den of the Whispered Word'

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan explained they were captured by orcs five years ago and sold to Maram.
source_quote: She explains they were captured by orcs five years ago and sold to Maram

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan suspects Maram is more than a half-elf.
source_quote: whom she suspects is more than a half-elf

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan confirmed seeing a Drow brought to Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Teegan confirms seeing a Drow brought to Maram il Vass

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan described the 'palace' as guarded by a 'mean gnome with grey skin' named Gabberforth.
source_quote: She describes the 'palace' as guarded by a 'mean gnome with grey skin' named Gabberforth

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth answers only to Maram il Vass.
source_quote: who answers only to Maram il Vass

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan shoved a pointed stick into both of his ears due to a mental breakdown from torture.
source_quote: leading him to shove a pointed stick into both of his ears

subject: Howling Winds
fact: The party had just passed through the Howling Winds.
source_quote: having just passed through the Howling Winds

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan and Drystan escaped only a day ago.
source_quote: as Teegan and Drystan escaped only a day ago

subject: level up
fact: The party reached 11th level.
source_quote: The party is informed they have reached 11th level

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur decided to infuse his own armor for 17 AC.
source_quote: decides to infuse his own armor for 17 AC

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas gained a new ability called Volley.
source_quote: Akritas gains a new ability called Volley

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear's hit points were increased to reflect its new level.
source_quote: The Owlbear's hit points are increased to reflect its new level

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim gained new spells including Command, True Seeing, Tongues, and Banishment.
source_quote: Bramgrim gains new spells, including Command, True Seeing (his only 6th-level spell), Tongues, and Banishment

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur discussed using his Spell Storing Item ability to store Cure Wounds, Enlarge/Reduce, or Levitate.
source_quote: Felkur discusses using his Spell Storing Item ability to store Cure Wounds, Enlarge/Reduce, or Levitate

subject: True Seeing strategy
fact: The party decided to save True Seeing for when they are in the presence of Maram il Vass.
source_quote: They decide to save True Seeing for when they are in the presence of Maram il Vass

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is suspected of being more than a half-elf.
source_quote: whom she suspects is more than a half-elf

subject: Drow prisoner location
fact: Teegan does not know the exact location of the Drow within the palace.
source_quote: though she doesn't know his exact location within the palace
